task_queue.description: Task queue the activity was scheduled on.

status.description: ActivityExecutionStatus enum name (SCHEDULED, STARTED, COMPLETED, FAILED, TIMED_OUT, CANCELED, ABANDONED).

attempt.description: Attempt count for the current execution (1-based).

start_time.description: RFC3339 timestamp of when the activity attempt started.

close_time.description: RFC3339 timestamp of when the activity closed (empty while still running).

last_failure.description: String form of the last activity failure, if any.

last_worker_identity.description: Identity of the worker that last picked up the activity.
